input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.5
            TITLE: front hoop

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.5: Front Hoop
F.1.5 Front Hoop 
A roll bar located above the driver’s legs, in proximity to the steering wheel.

final_answer: Front Hoop A roll bar located above the driver’s legs, in proximity to the steering wheel.
